summary: Controlled experiment routing contract with deterministic assignment and rollback controls.
purpose: Provide deterministic cohort assignment, rollout contract resolution, and emergency kill-switch control under high-tier governance.

scope: Feature flag resolution with explicit version refs.

controls: Kill-switch actions must include operator identity and trace reason.
Cohort and flag decisions are append-only trace events.

evidence_contract.hash_policy: Bindings and approvals must remain hash-referenced.
evidence_contract.trace_linkage: All cohort, flag, and kill-switch decisions must remain append-only trace events.

change_log.change: Collapsed experiment MCP Markdown docs into a single JSON contract bundle.
